overall.description: First-person exploration of a spooky, abandoned Southern Gothic mansion during a storm. The player approaches the house through overgrown gardens, circles the front courtyard with a central gazebo, ascends the grand split staircase, and attempts to open a locked entrance door. High-quality survival horror game engine rendering with atmospheric lighting and detailed wooden architecture.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the garden toward the mansion, observing the building through the framing trees

entered.detail: large two-story wooden mansion with columns and balconies, partially obscured by trees
massive oak tree with hanging Spanish moss dominating the right side of the frame
dense green bushes and garden plants lining the approach path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view approaching a spooky Southern Gothic mansion through an overgrown garden. The massive wooden house looms ahead through the trees under stormy skies, with large oak trees and dense vegetation framing the path.

events.description: emerges from dense tree cover into the open front courtyard of the mansion

agents.ego_description: circling around the front of the mansion, passing the central wrought iron gazebo structure

entered.detail: domed metal gazebo with intricate patterns situated in the center of the courtyard
elegant curved staircase splitting into two wings leading to the mansion entrance

segments.scene_description: Moving into the open front courtyard, the camera reveals the full facade of the mansion and a prominent wrought iron gazebo. The grand split staircase becomes visible leading up to the entrance, while the large oak trees fall behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase and upper porch balcony

events.description: begins ascending the curved grand staircase toward the mansion entrance
moves into the shadow of the mansion porch, reducing ambient light

agents.ego_description: climbing the curved stone staircase and walking along the covered porch toward the entrance

entered.detail: ornate white stone railing lining the staircase and porch edge
weathered gray wooden siding with vertical planks covering the mansion walls
tall classical columns supporting the porch roof

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the grand split staircase, moving from the open courtyard into the sheltered porch area. Stone balustrades and classical columns frame the approach as the lighting shifts to shadow, with the wooden siding of the mansion now visible up close.

events.description: attempts to open the locked french doors, revealing a red locked indicator

agents.ego_description: approaching the entrance and attempting to open the locked french doors, hands visible reaching for the handles

entered.detail: double doors with glass panes and white frames, showing a dark interior hallway beyond

segments.scene_description: Approaching the mansion entrance, the camera focuses on the french doors in the dim porch light. The player character's hands reach out to try the door handles, discovering them locked as indicated by a red prompt, while peering into the dark interior hallway visible through the glass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person approach from a wild, overgrown garden toward the imposing entrance of a spooky Southern Gothic mansion. It begins by pushing through dense vegetation and framing oak trees under stormy skies, moving steadily toward the looming wooden structure. As the camera enters the open front courtyard, the view expands to reveal the full facade of the house and a wrought iron gazebo before the path leads toward a grand split staircase. The scene then shifts from the open air into the shadows of the sheltered porch, ascending past stone balustrades and classical columns as the wooden siding of the mansion comes into sharp focus. Finally, the camera closes in on the dim light of the porch to reveal french doors, where hands reach out to find the handles locked while peering into a dark interior hallway.
